warning: value assigned to `t` is never read
 --> benchmark_results/2026-05-06T18-03-03/llama-3.1-70b/expressions/comma_op_c2/sample_001/target.rs:5:7
  |
5 |   let t = 10;
  |       ^
  |
  = help: maybe it is overwritten before being read?

error[E0384]: cannot assign twice to immutable variable `t`
 --> benchmark_results/2026-05-06T18-03-03/llama-3.1-70b/expressions/comma_op_c2/sample_001/target.rs:6:15
  |
5 |   let t = 10;
  |       - first assignment to `t`
6 |   let val = { t = f1(); f2(t) };
  |               ^^^^^^^^ cannot assign twice to immutable variable
  |
help: consider making this binding mutable
  |
5 |   let mut t = 10;
  |       +++
